debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
R : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁴ : Field R
inst✝³ : LinearOrder R
inst✝² : IsStrictOrderedRing R
inst✝¹ : AddCommGroup E
inst✝ : Module R E
s : Finset ι
f : ι → E
t : Finset { x // x ∈ ↑s }
w : { x // x ∈ ↑s } → R
hw₀ : ∀ i ∈ t, 0 ≤ w i
hw₁ : t.sum w = 1
⊢ ∑ x ∈ {x ∈ s | ∃ (x_1 : x ∈ s), ⟨x, ⋯⟩ ∈ t}.attach, w ⟨↑x, ⋯⟩ = 1 ∧
    s.centerMass (fun i => if h : ∃ (x : i ∈ s), ⟨i, ⋯⟩ ∈ t then w ⟨i, ⋯⟩ else 0) f =
      (affineCombination R t (f ∘ Subtype.val)) w

proof:
have hsum : ∑ i ∈ s,
          (fun i ↦ if h : ∃ x_1 : i ∈ s, ⟨i, x_1⟩ ∈ t then w ⟨i, h.choose⟩ else 0) i = 1 := by
        simp only [Finset.sum_dite, Finset.sum_const_zero, add_zero]
        rw [← hw₁]
        exact Finset.sum_nbij
          (fun a => ⟨a.1, (Finset.mem_filter.mp a.2).2.choose⟩)
          (fun a _ => (Finset.mem_filter.mp a.2).2.choose_spec)
          (fun a₁ _ a₂ _ h => Subtype.ext (Subtype.mk.inj h))
          (fun b hb => ⟨⟨b.1, Finset.mem_filter.mpr ⟨b.2, b.2, hb⟩⟩,
            Finset.mem_attach _ _, Subtype.ext rfl⟩)
          (fun _ _ => rfl)
      constructor
      · rw [← hw₁]
        exact Finset.sum_nbij
          (fun a => ⟨a.1, (Finset.mem_filter.mp a.2).2.choose⟩)
          (fun a _ => (Finset.mem_filter.mp a.2).2.choose_spec)
          (fun a₁ _ a₂ _ h => Subtype.ext (Subtype.mk.inj h))
          (fun b hb => ⟨⟨b.1, Finset.mem_filter.mpr ⟨b.2, b.2, hb⟩⟩,
            Finset.mem_attach _ _, Subtype.ext rfl⟩)
          (fun _ _ => rfl)
      · rw [Finset.centerMass_eq_of_sum_1 _ _ hsum]
        conv_lhs =>
          arg 2; ext i
          rw [show (if h : ∃ x_1 : i ∈ s, ⟨i, x_1⟩ ∈ t then
              w ⟨i, h.choose⟩ else 0) • f i =
            if h : ∃ x_1 : i ∈ s, ⟨i, x_1⟩ ∈ t then
              w ⟨i, h.choose⟩ • f i else 0 from by
                split_ifs <;> simp]
        simp only [Finset.sum_dite, Finset.sum_const_zero, add_zero]
        trans ∑ i ∈ t, w i • (f ∘ Subtype.val) i
        · exact Finset.sum_nbij
            (fun a => ⟨a.1, (Finset.mem_filter.mp a.2).2.choose⟩)
            (fun a _ => (Finset.mem_filter.mp a.2).2.choose_spec)
            (fun a₁ _ a₂ _ h => Subtype.ext (Subtype.mk.inj h))
            (fun b hb => ⟨⟨b.1, Finset.mem_filter.mpr ⟨b.2, b.2, hb⟩⟩,
              Finset.mem_attach _ _, Subtype.ext rfl⟩)
            (fun _ _ => rfl)
        · rw [← Finset.centerMass_eq_of_sum_1 _ _ hw₁]
          exact (affineCombination_eq_centerMass hw₁).symm
successful_attempts:
have hsum : ∑ i ∈ s,
          (fun i ↦ if h : ∃ x_1 : i ∈ s, ⟨i, x_1⟩ ∈ t then w ⟨i, h.choose⟩ else 0) i = 1 := by
        simp only [Finset.sum_dite, Finset.sum_const_zero, add_zero]
        rw [← hw₁]
        exact Finset.sum_nbij
          (fun a => ⟨a.1, (Finset.mem_filter.mp a.2).2.choose⟩)
          (fun a _ => (Finset.mem_filter.mp a.2).2.choose_spec)
          (fun a₁ _ a₂ _ h => Subtype.ext (Subtype.mk.inj h))
          (fun b hb => ⟨⟨b.1, Finset.mem_filter.mpr ⟨b.2, b.2, hb⟩⟩,
            Finset.mem_attach _ _, Subtype.ext rfl⟩)
          (fun _ _ => rfl)
      constructor
      · rw [← hw₁]
        exact Finset.sum_nbij
          (fun a => ⟨a.1, (Finset.mem_filter.mp a.2).2.choose⟩)
          (fun a _ => (Finset.mem_filter.mp a.2).2.choose_spec)
          (fun a₁ _ a₂ _ h => Subtype.ext (Subtype.mk.inj h))
          (fun b hb => ⟨⟨b.1, Finset.mem_filter.mpr ⟨b.2, b.2, hb⟩⟩,
            Finset.mem_attach _ _, Subtype.ext rfl⟩)
          (fun _ _ => rfl)
      · rw [Finset.centerMass_eq_of_sum_1 _ _ hsum]
        conv_lhs =>
          arg 2; ext i
          rw [show (if h : ∃ x_1 : i ∈ s, ⟨i, x_1⟩ ∈ t then
              w ⟨i, h.choose⟩ else 0) • f i =
            if h : ∃ x_1 : i ∈ s, ⟨i, x_1⟩ ∈ t then
              w ⟨i, h.choose⟩ • f i else 0 from by
                split_ifs <;> simp]
        simp only [Finset.sum_dite, Finset.sum_const_zero, add_zero]
        trans ∑ i ∈ t, w i • (f ∘ Subtype.val) i
        · exact Finset.sum_nbij
            (fun a => ⟨a.1, (Finset.mem_filter.mp a.2).2.choose⟩)
            (fun a _ => (Finset.mem_filter.mp a.2).2.choose_spec)
            (fun a₁ _ a₂ _ h => Subtype.ext (Subtype.mk.inj h))
            (fun b hb => ⟨⟨b.1, Finset.mem_filter.mpr ⟨b.2, b.2, hb⟩⟩,
              Finset.mem_attach _ _, Subtype.ext rfl⟩)
            (fun _ _ => rfl)
        · rw [← Finset.centerMass_eq_of_sum_1 _ _ hw₁]
          exact (affineCombination_eq_centerMass hw₁).symm
